question: list all users
gold_sql: SELECT id, name, role, status FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT 100

question: count users
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(id) AS user_count FROM users LIMIT 100

question: list all terminals
gold_sql: SELECT id, terminal_name, location FROM terminals ORDER BY id LIMIT 100

question: count berths by terminal
gold_sql: SELECT t.terminal_name, COUNT(b.id) AS berth_count FROM terminals AS t LEFT JOIN berths AS b ON b.terminal_id = t.id GROUP BY t.id, t.terminal_name ORDER BY t.id LIMIT 100

question: list active service orders
gold_sql: SELECT id, cost, status, user_id, berth_id FROM service_orders WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY id LIMIT 100

question: total service order cost by terminal
gold_sql: SELECT t.terminal_name, SUM(s.cost) AS total_cost FROM service_orders AS s JOIN berths AS b ON b.id = s.berth_id JOIN terminals AS t ON t.id = b.terminal_id GROUP BY t.id, t.terminal_name ORDER BY t.id LIMIT 100

question: vessels assigned to berth
gold_sql: SELECT v.vessel_name, b.berth_name, a.status FROM vessel_berth_assignments AS a JOIN vessels AS v ON v.id = a.vessel_id JOIN berths AS b ON b.id = a.berth_id ORDER BY a.id LIMIT 100

question: assignments by user
gold_sql: SELECT u.name, COUNT(a.id) AS assignment_count FROM users AS u JOIN assignments AS a ON a.user_id = u.id GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY u.id LIMIT 100

question: latest service orders
gold_sql: SELECT id, cost, status, created_at FROM service_orders ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 3

question: filter service orders by completed status
gold_sql: SELECT id, cost, user_id, berth_id FROM service_orders WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY id LIMIT 100

question: aggregate assigned berths by vessel
gold_sql: SELECT v.vessel_name, COUNT(a.berth_id) AS berth_count FROM vessels AS v JOIN vessel_berth_assignments AS a ON a.vessel_id = v.id GROUP BY v.id, v.vessel_name ORDER BY v.id LIMIT 100

question: join vessel berth assignments to vessels and berths
gold_sql: SELECT a.id, v.vessel_name, b.berth_code, a.assigned_at FROM vessel_berth_assignments AS a JOIN vessels AS v ON v.id = a.vessel_id JOIN berths AS b ON b.id = a.berth_id ORDER BY a.id LIMIT 100
